_comment: Copy the 'expected' object into each run's questions[0]. Fill value/predicate/reason; delete keys you do not need. Do not commit this file as a run — leading underscore is intentional.

run_002.question: Valt Ahmed onder de definitie van een vreemdeling in de zin van artikel 1 van deze wet?

expected.reason: Gold: Ahmed has no Belgian nationality and resides without valid permit → qualifies as foreign national under Art. 1.

run_003.question: Is NV Delta een microvennootschap in de zin van artikel 1:25?

expected.reason: Gold: check Art. 1:25 micro-enterprise criteria against stated headcount, turnover, balance total.

run_004.question: Welk erfrecht verkrijgt de langstlevende echtgenoot volgens artikel 4.17, paragraaf 2?
run_004.note: Pipeline usually asks one Bool predicate. Pick the derived predicate that encodes the Art. 4.17(2) outcome for Dirk (not whole-estate usufruct under par. 1). Set value true if that outcome holds.

expected.reason: Gold: Art. 4.17(2) — deceased left ascendants/collateral; surviving spouse gets furniture usufruct + use of residence (not par. 1 whole-estate usufruct).

alternative_set_mode.reason: Only if extraction uses mode=set and deduction_set; list predicate names that are entailed (lowercase constants).

run_005.question: Wat verstaat deze wet onder illegaal verblijf?
run_005.recommended: boolean (rephrase mentally as: do these facts constitute illegal stay?)
run_005.note: The pipeline does not answer definitional 'what does X mean' well. Prefer gold = whether the case facts satisfy illegal stay under the law.

expected.reason: Gold: facts describe stay >3 months without lawful residence conditions → illegal stay applies.

run_006.question: Wanneer gaan de gevolgen van die overschrijding in volgens artikel 1:24, paragraaf 2?
run_006.recommended: boolean (simplest) OR get_range (only if you use intent query + numeric function in KB)

expected_boolean.reason: Gold: two consecutive years over thresholds → consequences triggered (Art. 1:24(2)).

expected_get_range.reason: Gold: numeric delay in days/months until consequences apply; symbol must match a function in kb_schema; entity = company constant if unary.

run_007.question: Welk recht heeft de langstlevende wettelijk samenwonende op het onroerend goed ... artikel 4.23?
run_007.note: Pick the Bool predicate for Art. 4.23 family-home right for the surviving legal cohabitant.

expected.reason: Gold: Art. 4.23 — surviving legal cohabitant's right regarding the family's main dwelling.

run_008.question: Kan dit een indicatie zijn voor het risico op onderduiken ... artikel 1, paragraaf 2?

expected.reason: Gold: removal procedure + false documents → indicator for absconding risk under Art. 1(2).

run_009.question: Wordt deze vennootschap nog als kleine vennootschap beschouwd volgens artikel 1:24, paragraaf 1?

expected.reason: Gold: 55 employees and €12M turnover exceed small-company thresholds → no longer 'kleine vennootschap' under Art. 1:24(1).
